Optional. If set, this value is sent aft: Optional. If set, this value is sent after 'Basic '. Username/password are then ignored.
Minimum time between two writes to the s: Minimum time between two writes to the same state. Recommended to avoid too many writes, which could damage the device EEPROM. Set to 0 to disable.
Optional comma-separated list. Empty = a: Optional comma-separated list. Empty = all devices returned by the API.
Reads active alarms for each device duri: Reads active alarms for each device during polling.
